overall.description: Dark fantasy game footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a storm-ravaged medieval village at dusk. The scene features wooden structures, a prominent dead tree, burning campfires, and ominous storm clouds creating a cinematic low-light atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: storm-lashed village square with central dead tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy village square toward the large dead tree, with swords visible on back

entered.detail: burning fire providing orange light against the dark stormy background
massive leafless tree with twisted branches dominating the center of the village square
traditional wooden village house with sloped roof on the left side
wooden structure with dark silhouette on the right side of the path
scattered wooden fence debris and barriers along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark stormy village square with a large dead tree at its center. The protagonist walks forward through muddy terrain, passing a burning campfire on the left. Traditional wooden cottages frame the scene on both sides while wooden barricades litter the right side of the path. The atmosphere is ominous with storm clouds covering the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: path between wooden village buildings approaching large barn structure

events.description: character slightly turns rightward revealing the large wooden barn structure on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing past the dead tree and approaching a larger fortified wooden building on the right side

entered.detail: large fortified wooden structure with multiple levels and external stairs on the right side
wooden scaffolding or stair structure leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: As the character moves past the central dead tree, the scene shifts to reveal a larger fortified wooden barn on the right. The campfire falls behind out of view while the dead tree moves to the left background. The path narrows between buildings as the character approaches wooden stairs leading to the structure, maintaining the dark stormy atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a storm-ravaged village square that gradually narrows into a confined path toward a fortified structure. It begins in a dark, muddy square dominated by a large dead tree, passing a burning campfire on the left while wooden cottages and barricades frame the route. As the protagonist moves past the central tree, the campfire recedes from view and the dead tree shifts into the left background. The scene then tightens as the path narrows between buildings, finally leading the camera toward wooden stairs ascending into a large fortified barn under an ominous, cloud-covered sky.
